CustomField.formula: IF(FIND(BLANKVALUE(TEXT(MailingCountryCode),'00'),',SY,IR,PS,LB,IQ,KP',0)>0,"F",IF((NOT(FIND(BLANKVALUE(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c),'00'),',Hedge Fund,Hedge Funds and Asset Management,Private Equity,Venture Capital & Private Equity,VC and Private Equity,Private Equity and Venture Capital,Venture Capital,Venture Capital & Private Equity,Equity Research,Investors,Ent Investors',0)>0||CONTAINS(BLANKVALUE(LOWER(ROE_Division__c),'00'),'investors')||CONTAINS(BLANKVALUE(LOWER(TEXT(Department__c)),'00'),'investment')||CONTAINS(LOWER(BLANKVALUE(Business_Unit__c,'00')),'strat'))),IF((CONTAINS(LOWER(BLANKVALUE(TEXT(Use_of_Similarweb__c),'00')),'school')||CONTAINS(LOWER(BLANKVALUE(Title,'00')),'student')||FIND('.....',SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(Clean_Domain__c),'.student','.....'),'student.','.....'),'.ac.','.....'),'.edu','.....'),'edu.','.....'),'students.','.....'),'tcd.ie','.....'),'umail.ucc.ie','.....'))>0||LOWER(Department_Other_Description__c)='education - student'),'S',IF(AND(CONTAINS(LOWER(TEXT(Use_of_Similarweb__c)),'personal'),NOT(FIND(TEXT(MailingCountryCode),',US,FR,CN,JP,ES,IT,CA,IL,AU,HK,PR,SG,SE,TH,')>0))||(OR(CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'publishers and media'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'retail'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'classifieds'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'b2c internet services'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'travel'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'other'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'telecom'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'pharma'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'automotive'),CONTAINS(LOWER(Text(Account.SW_Industry__c)),'education'))&&MAX(BLANKVALUE(Account.sw_connector__swId__r.sw_connector__Visits__c,0),BLANKVALUE(SI_Enrichment_Visits__c,0))<=50000)||AND(OR(FIND(LOWER(TEXT(MailingCountryCode)),',pk,ng,bd,tn,lk,bo,br,cr,cu,do,gt,hn,ni,pa,pe,py,sv,uy,ve,mn,ma,ng,eg,dz,ke,tn,gh,et,cm,bj,ci,tz,ao,ug,zw,sn,ly,so,mu,mz,mg,re,rw,tg,zm,cd,bf,bw,na,mr,ga,ml,gn,sl,mw,gm,cg,sz,sc,cv,dj,ls,ne,bi,gq,gw,st,td,lr,er',0)>0,BLANKVALUE(Account.Employees_Min__c ,0)<=10,AND(TEXT(MailingCountryCode)='IN',(BLANKVALUE(Account.Employees_Min__c ,0)<=200||NOT(CONTAINS(LOWER(TEXT(Email_address_domain_type__c)),'company')||NOT(ISBLANK(LinkedIn_Profile__c))||LinkedIn__c=TRUE))),AND(NOT(OR(CONTAINS(LOWER(BLANKVALUE(TEXT(Email_address_domain_type__c),'00')),'company'),NOT(ISBLANK(LinkedIn_Profile__c)),LinkedIn__c=TRUE)),Website__c='no_website')),NOT(FIND(LOWER(TEXT(Seniority__c)),',vp/director,c-suite',0)>0&&BLANKVALUE(Account.Employees_Min__c ,0)>50&&NOT(TEXT(MailingCountryCode)='IN'&&BLANKVALUE(Account.Employees_Min__c ,0)<=200)))||NOT(CONTAINS(LOWER(BLANKVALUE(TEXT(Email_address_domain_type__c),'00')),'company')||NOT(ISBLANK(LinkedIn_Profile__c))||LinkedIn__c=TRUE),'E',IF((TEXT(MailingCountryCode)=''||FIND(LOWER(TEXT(MailingCountryCode)),',uu,xx,',0)>0),'X','A-D'))),IF((TEXT(MailingCountryCode)=''||FIND(LOWER(TEXT(MailingCountryCode)),',uu,xx,',0)>0),'X','A-D')))
CustomField.label: Fit Score Estimation Ops
